title: CR. APP (SJ)/233/2024 - Om Prakash Singh @ Sonu Kumar  Vs The State of Bihar
text:
IN THE HIGH COURT OF JUDICATURE AT PATNA
CRIMINAL APPEAL (SJ) No.233 of 2024
Arising Out of PS. Case No.-94 Year-2022 Thana- SASARAM MUFFSIL District- Rohtas
======================================================
Om Prakash Singh @ Sonu Kumar Son of Sri Vijendra Prasad Singh R/o vill -
Basuhara, P.S. - Sasaram Mufassil, Distt. - Rohtas
... ... Appellant/s
Versus
1. The State of Bihar
2. Sukhan Ram Son of Late Bagedu Ran R/o vill - Rasulpur Karamhari,
Mohania ward no 02, P.S. - Mohania, Distt. - Kaimur (Bhabua)
... ... Respondent/s
======================================================
Appearance :
For the Appellant/s : Mr. Ajay Kumar Tiwari, Advocate
For the Respondent/s : Ms. Usha Kumari 1, A.P.P.
======================================================
CORAM: HONOURABLE MR. JUSTICE NAWNEET KUMAR
PANDEY
ORAL ORDER
7 16-05-2025 Heard learned counsel for the parties.
2. The present appeal has been preferred against the
order dated 08.11.2023 passed by learned Additional District
and Sessions Judge 17th cum-Special Judge SC/ST, Rohtas at
Sasaram in Regd No. 54 of 2022 in Sasaram Muffasil
(Karbandiya O.P.) P.S. Case No. 94 of 2022 dated 26.02.2022
under Sections 302, 201, 120(B), 406 and 420 of the Indian
Penal Code and Section 3(2)(v) of the S.C./S.T. Act whereby
and whereunder the learned Special Judge, SC/ST, Rohtas has
been pleased to reject the prayer for bail made on behalf of the
appellant as well as grant bail to the appellant in Regd. No. 54
of 2022 in Sasaram Muffasil (Karbandiya O.P.) P.S. Case No. 94

Patna High Court CR. APP (SJ) No.233 of 2024(7) dt.16-05-2025
2/2
of 2022.
3. The bail application of the appellant has been
rejected vide order dated 29.04.2023 in Cr. Appeal (S.J.) No.
3187 of 2022.
4. Learned counsel for the informant apprised the
Court that all the nine prosecution witnesses have been
examined and trial is on the verge of its conclusion to which the
learned counsel for the appellant fairly concedes.
5. I do not see any reason to reconsider the order
dated 29.04.2023, accordingly, rejected.
(Nawneet Kumar Pandey, J)
Neha/-
U T
parties: Om Prakash Singh @ Sonu Kumar  Vs The State of Bihar
